title: Trump on F-15 shootdown: JD Vance warned about Russian air defense in 2023; Trump called Vance a loser; huge geopolitical moment
snippet: The F-15 was shot down by Iran's Russian-made air defense system. This is what JD Vance warned about in 2023. Trump dismissed this concern, calling Vance a loser.

title: Trump administration negotiating Iran nuclear deal WITHOUT nuclear experts; those with nuclear experience were purged
snippet: Trump administration was negotiating an Iran nuclear deal and didn't include any nuclear experts in the delegation. The only people with nuclear experience in the administration were purged.

title: Trump: 'No, it's war' — NBC asks if F-15E shootdown will impact talks
snippet: Trump asked if downed jet to impact talks: No its war. NBC

title: Second US Warplane Lost: A-10 Warthog Crashes Near Hormuz
snippet: Second US Warplane Lost: A-10 Warthog Crashes Near Hormuz

title: BREAKING: Trump will not say what US will do if missing F-15E pilot is harmed
snippet: First American aviator shot down over enemy territory since April 2003

title: Qatar officially declined to serve as lead mediator for US-Iran ceasefire
snippet: Qatar told US officials it is not eager to spearhead negotiations, further stalling diplomatic efforts (WSJ/Reuters)

title: Trump convenes national security team amid escalating Iran conflict
snippet: Trump convenes national security team amid escalating Iran conflict. US military assessing options after Iran refuses ceasefire.

title: Oil prices surge as US-Iran tensions escalate — Brent above $109/barrel
snippet: Brent crude pushes above 109 per barrel amid US military losses in Iran. ISM PMI prices paid at highest since 2022 driven by oil supply disruptions.

title: US military assessing options after Iran refuses ceasefire — sources
snippet: US officials weighing next steps after Iran declines ceasefire offer, multiple sources say.

title: ISM PMI stagflation signal: prices paid jumped 7.8pts to 78.3, highest since June 2022
snippet: ISM Manufacturing PMI March: prices paid jumped 7.8pts to 78.3 driven by surging oil prices and supply chain disruptions

title: Fed officials warn of rising inflation risks due to energy prices, rate policy at crossroads
snippet: Multiple Fed officials say inflation pressure intensified due to energy price surge, but economic slowdown makes rate cuts dilemma.

title: Iran downs 2 US warplanes, 2 missiles, 3 drones in single day
snippet: Iran downs 2 US warplanes, 2 missiles, 3 drones in single day. Iran calls it black day for US and Israeli air forces

title: CDS trading volume surged 69pct Q1 2026 to $4.5 trillion, highest on record
snippet: CDS trading volume surged 69pct in Q1 2026 to 4.5 trillion dollars, highest on record. Iran War plus AI debt concerns driving hedging. Europe turned bearish for first time since 2018

title: US job growth February revised DOWN to minus 133K; stagflation signal
snippet: US job growth in February revised from minus 92K to minus 133K. Biggest monthly US job loss since December 2020. One-year inflation expectations exceed 5pct.
